posts.label: Meme 1
posts.fb_caption: Okay can we normalize that you are allowed to NOT carry everyone’s emotional weight? 😅 Are you the therapist friend? Tag someone who always shows up for everyone else but forgets about themselves. 💜

posts.label: Meme 2
posts.fb_caption: The most powerful thing I ever did? Said “no” without explaining myself. 🌸 Are you in your boundary-setting era? Drop a 💜 below — you deserve your own peace.

posts.ig_caption: Journaling is one of the most powerful tools for self-discovery — and mindfulness makes it even deeper. 🌿 Save this for your next journaling session! 📓 #Zenie #ZenieApp #JournalingLife #MindfulWellness

posts.label: Repost 2
posts.creator: (verify handle before posting)
posts.ig_caption: Wait — this reframe about journaling just stopped me in my tracks. 😯 Are you venting or actually processing? This one’s worth saving. 📖 #Zenie #ZenieApp #JournalingTips #HealingJourney #MentalHealth

posts.label: Quote 1
posts.quote: Tell me, what is it you plan to do with your one wild and precious life?
posts.fb_caption: One wild, precious life. That’s all we get. 🌿 What would you do if you stopped second-guessing yourself? Save this and let it be your nudge to start something new today. 💜

posts.label: Quote 2
posts.quote: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
posts.fb_caption: Some of the most radiant people carry invisible scars. 💜 Your healing journey — however messy or slow — is already making you whole. Who would you share this with today?
